journal_red_flags: Omitting computational complexity, latency, FLOPs, or memory footprint analysis, which are critical for circuits and systems
Evaluating video processing, coding, or analysis methods without standard domain-specific metrics (e.g., BD-rate, PSNR, SSIM) or standard video datasets
Failing to compare against both CNN-based and Transformer-based state-of-the-art baselines
Relying solely on mathematical formulations without intuitive, detailed architectural or system-level diagrams
Presenting purely empirical results without analyzing the underlying algorithmic or system-level mechanisms
Omitting formal mathematical problem formulation before introducing the proposed methodology
Relying solely on a single dataset or narrow task for validating a generic building block
Listing related works without explicit comparison or contrast to the proposed method
